allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "--- mvn ---"; \(Get-Command mvn -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if \(Test-Path .\\mvnw.cmd\) { Write-Output "mvnw present" }; Write-Output "--- java ---"; \(Get-Command java\).Source; Write-Output "--- docker ---"; try { docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' | Out-Null; Write-Output "docker OK" } catch { Write-Output "docker NOT running" }; Write-Output "--- cucumber cache ---"; Test-Path "$env:USERPROFILE\\.m2\\repository\\io\\cucumber")
